title: CaseStatistics
description: An AGGREGATE, non-identifying summary of OCME death-investigation casework — counts of cases by period, borough, and manner of death (the statutory Natural / Accident / Homicide / Suicide / Undetermined). This is the proposed respectful shape for OCME's core object: a medical-examiner case. There is NO Open Data twin today (opendata_gap = true) — OCME publishes no casework, not even aggregated. A per-decedent DeathInvestigation record is confidential and is deliberately NOT modeled; nothing below can identify an individual.

x-source.privacy: Aggregate counts only. No decedent identifiers, cause of death, or investigative detail. Cells below a small-count threshold should be suppressed by the publisher.

caseCount.description: Number of investigated cases in the cell (period × borough × manner). Suppress small cells.

ageBand.description: Coarse decedent age band, for demographic aggregates only.

jurisdiction.description: Whether the death fell within OCME's statutory jurisdiction and the reporting category.
